title: National Meat Contamination Alert
description: A major meat supplier reports possible contamination affecting nationwide distribution.

C.title: Issue a warning but allow sales to continue

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: A full recall is costly but protects consumer trust long-term.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Contamination is a security threat. We can’t gamble with public health.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: A full recall punishes businesses before we know the full scope.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Targeted recalls balance safety and economic stability.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Warnings alone won’t stop people from getting sick.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: People deserve the freedom to decide based on transparent warnings.
